title: The Secret of Monkey Island
edition_pinned: The Secret of Monkey Island: Special Edition Steam app 32360 listing, observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1990 SCUMM design the Special Edition re-imagines.
moat: Verb-and-object inventory puzzles gate story islands so progress is deduction, not combat skill.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One SCUMM interaction grammar recombines dialogue, items, and island maps into a multi-act campaign.
exemplar_rationale: Defines classic point-and-click adventure depth via authored comedy and inventory logic.

evidence.claim: Steam reported 6186 all-language, all-purchase user reviews for The Secret of Monkey Island: Special Edition.
Steam appdetails genres field listed: Adventure.
